main_reference_measurement: li383 CLI 4.48 s first process, 1.34 s second process (3.3x); machine-fingerprinted cache, zero user configuration
assessment: Default cache configuration is complete. The persistent cache removes 6.14 s (65%) for the circular case, but its second-process wall remains above the approximate 2.5 s target even though li383 reaches 1.34 s. Remaining work is case-specific cached dispatch/solve cost or a non-JAX CLI lane; import time is not the dominant remainder.
